message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[[\"acct_USD_A\", \"acct_USD_B\", 1000.0], [\"acct1_EUR\", \"acct2_USD\", 1250.0], [\"acct_USD_A\", \"acct_USD_B\", 0.0], [\"a_USD\", \"b_USD\", 600.0], [\"a_USD\", \"b_USD\", 600.0], [\"client123_USD\", \"client123_EUR\", 1300.0], [\"client123_EUR\", \"client123_USD\", 1200.0]","{\"volume_threshold\": 1000.0, \"frequency_threshold\": 2, \"cross_currency_sensitivity\": 0.8, \"cycle_threshold\": 2000.0}"],"focus":"Boundary volumes (exactly at thresholds), zero-amount transaction, repeated pair hitting frequency threshold, and rapid cross-currency self-loop for the same logical account (currency-suffixed names). Tests strict comparisons and currency-parsing assumptions."},{"input_lines":["[[\"A_USD\", \"B_EUR\", 700.0], [\"B_EUR\", \"C_GBP\", 800.0], [\"C_GBP\", \"D_USD\", 600.0], [\"D_USD\", \"A_USD\", 100.0], [\"X_USD\", \"Y_EUR\", 1200.0], [\"r1_USD\", \"r2_USD\", 300.0], [\"r1_USD\", \"r2_USD\", 300.0], [\"r1_USD\", \"r2_USD\", 300.0], [\"r1_USD\", \"r2_USD\", 300.0]]","{\"volume_threshold\": 1000.0, \"frequency_threshold\": 3, \"cross_currency_sensitivity\": 0.9, \"cycle_threshold\": 2200.0}"],"focus":"Multi-hop cycle spanning four nodes (sum near/at cycle threshold), a clear cross-currency spike, and a repeated small-pair appearing enough times to exceed both aggregated volume and frequency thresholds. Stresses cycle detection and aggregation logic."},{"input_lines":["[[\"same_USD\", \"same_USD\", 1500.0], [\"weirdAcct\", \"weirdAcct\", 500.0], [\"alphaEUR\", \"betaEUR\", 999.9999999], [\"alphaEUR\", \"betaEUR\", 0.0000002], [\"companyA\", \"companyB\", 2000.0], [\"lonely_USD\", \"other_USD\", 1000.0000001]]","{\"volume_threshold\": 1000.0, \"frequency_threshold\": 2, \"cycle_threshold\": 3000.0}"],"focus":"Format-sensitive account names (no explicit currency suffix), floating-point precision around thresholds, true same-account self-loop, and missing cross_currency_sensitivity key to test default/missing-parameter handling."}]}
